use_cases: Quick-access navigation bar for SaaS applications and tools
Application launcher dock inspired by macOS-style interfaces
Floating toolbar for media controls and playback actions
Icon-based navigation menu for desktop and mobile interfaces
Tool palette dock for creative and productivity software
ai_summary: A navigation dock component that displays a row of icons or buttons for quick access to applications, tools, or core features. Inspired by macOS dock aesthetics, it typically includes hover magnification effects, smooth transitions, and click-based navigation. Suitable for building application launchers, toolbars, and quick-action menus across desktop and mobile platforms.
